companies.name: Sunstone Energy

departments.name: Engineering
departments.description: Responsible for designing high-efficiency solar grid integrations and battery storage solutions.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Manages supply chain logistics and field maintenance for large-scale solar installations.

departments.name: Sales
departments.description: Handles client acquisition and contract negotiations for municipal and commercial energy projects.

departments.name: Customer Success
departments.description: Provides technical support and account management for long-term power purchase agreements.

companies.backstory: Sunstone Energy is currently scaling its grid modernization project across the Midwest to improve rural energy reliability. Teams are coordinating intensive site audits and supplier review meetings to prepare for the Q4 infrastructure rollout.

companies.name: Arbor Law

departments.name: Litigation
departments.description: Handles courtroom representation and dispute resolution for corporate clients.

departments.name: Intellectual Property
departments.description: Manages patent applications, trademark filings, and copyright protection.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Oversees firm infrastructure, internal logistics, and administrative support.

departments.name: Client Success
departments.description: Maintains long-term relationships and ensures client satisfaction across various legal matters.

companies.backstory: Arbor Law is currently managing a series of high-stakes patent filings for several emerging tech startups. The firm is also preparing for a firm-wide digital transformation initiative to migrate all physical case files to a secure cloud-based platform.

companies.name: Velon Athletics

departments.name: Design
departments.description: Creating the aesthetics and functional patterns for new clothing lines.

departments.name: Supply Chain
departments.description: Managing relationships with manufacturers and logistics for material sourcing.

departments.name: Marketing
departments.description: Developing advertising campaigns and social media presence for product launches.

departments.name: Finance
departments.description: Overseeing budgets, payroll, and the company's financial planning and analysis.

companies.backstory: Velon Athletics is currently shifting its production to 100% recycled materials for the upcoming winter collection. Teams are frequently meeting to finalize material tests and coordinate the grand opening of three new flagship retail stores in Europe.

companies.name: Veridian Urban

departments.name: Design
departments.description: Responsible for architectural blueprints and conceptual aesthetic planning.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Manages project timelines, site logistics, and vendor coordination.

departments.name: Sustainability
departments.description: Ensures all projects meet environmental standards and green building certifications.

departments.name: Public Relations
departments.description: Handles community outreach, municipal liaisons, and media communications.

companies.backstory: Veridian Urban specializes in revitalizing metropolitan districts through sustainable mixed-use developments. The firm is currently managing multiple site inspections and community planning sessions for the new Riverside Commons district project.
